# costory_team (Resource)

Manages a Costory team.

## Example Usage

```terraform
terraform {
  required_providers {
    costory = {
      source  = "costory-io/costory"
      version = ">= 0.1.0"
    }
  }
}

variable "costory_api_token" {
  type        = string
  description = "Costory API token."
  sensitive   = true
}

provider "costory" {
  token = var.costory_api_token
}

# Public team
resource "costory_team" "engineering" {
  name        = "Engineering"
  description = "All engineering members"
  visibility  = "PUBLIC"
}
```

<!-- schema generated by tfplugindocs -->
## Schema

### Required

- `name` (String) Team display name.

### Optional

- `description` (String) Optional team description.
- `visibility` (String) Team visibility. One of: `PRIVATE`, `PUBLIC`.

### Read-Only

- `created_at` (String) Team creation timestamp.
- `id` (String) Team ID returned by Costory.
- `updated_at` (String) Team last update timestamp.
